title: consignment_Full

availableShippingOptions.description: This is available only when "include=consignments.availableShippingOptions" is present in the URL.

type.description: Specifies the type of shipping option; for example, flat rate, UPS, etc.

transitTime.description: An estimate of the arrival time.

additionalDescription.description: Read only. Field used for Shipping Provider API.

couponDiscounts.description: List of consignment discounts applied through coupons.

code.description: Coupon code that applied this discount.

discounts.description: List of consignment discounts applied through cart level discounts.

id.description: Discount rule ID that applied this discount.

shippingCost.description: The shipping cost for this consignment.

handlingCost.description: The handling cost of shipping for this consignment.

description: This allows us to have multiple shipping addresses. Where there is only one shipping address, this array will contain only one value, with all the items.
